sections.title: Scheduled Tasks
sections.description: Set up recurring tasks that the agent runs automatically.

fields.label: Cron Tasks

item_fields.label: What to do
item_fields.placeholder: e.g., Check my calendar and summarize today's tasks

fields.help: Each task runs on a schedule and sends the prompt to the agent

fields.label: When to Act Proactively
fields.placeholder:
Describe situations where the agent should take initiative.
e.g., If a deadline is approaching, remind me. If a research task has been idle for 2 days, follow up.
fields.help: Optional — most agents are reactive (respond to messages). Proactive agents initiate actions on their own.
